title: ARCHIVED - Nunavut - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Nunavut - 2019 Income Tax Package
- File online - There are a variety of software products to meet your needs, some of which are free.
- Filing online is fast, easy, and secure. Let us help you through it. For more information about online filing, go to Get ready to file your 2019 income tax return .
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide - 2019
- Income Tax and Benefit Return
- Worksheet for the return
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2019
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2019
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings

## Territorial information and forms
- Information for residents of Nunavut
- Worksheet NU428 - Nunavut
- Form NU428 - Nunavut Tax
- Form NU479 - Nunavut Credits
- Schedule NU(S2) - Territorial Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule NU(S11) - Territorial Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
